overall.description: A smooth drone-style camera fly-around of a massive cathedral basilica in a video game environment. The camera circles the building showing its art deco architecture, green copper domes, and a large exterior crucifix, set against a partly cloudy afternoon sky with surrounding parkland.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of the basilica's distinctive rounded towers with green domes. The camera moves slowly along the paved plaza, keeping the illuminated stone walls and arched windows in view against a partly cloudy afternoon sky.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the basilica's extensive side facade with its tall vertical windows, then turns right toward the open park area, revealing grassy spaces and distant trees while the building recedes to the left.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the cathedral's grand front entrance with its wide stone stairs and massive arched portal. Tilting upward, it reveals the impressive green copper dome against the partly cloudy sky before moving along the front facade.

segments.scene_description: Moving to the cathedral's side, the camera approaches a large exterior crucifix mounted on the stone wall, examining it closely before turning away and departing through the tree-lined park paths, with the building receding into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a close-up study of the basilica's architecture before sweeping outward into the surrounding parkland and returning to a grand view of the main dome. It begins by gliding along the paved plaza, tracing the illuminated stone walls and green-domed rounded towers under a partly cloudy afternoon sky. As the camera continues along the extensive side facade and its tall vertical windows, the perspective shifts right, moving away from the stone structure to reveal open grassy spaces and distant trees. The scene then expands through the moderate tree coverage of the park before turning back toward the cathedral, finally revealing the magnificent main dome rising against the blue sky as the camera approaches the front entrance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with an intimate approach to the cathedral's grand entrance and gradually pulls away into the surrounding parkland. It begins by gliding toward the wide stone stairs and massive arched portal, tilting upward to reveal the impressive green copper dome set against a partly cloudy sky. As the camera moves along the front facade, the perspective shifts toward the side of the building to closely examine a large exterior crucifix mounted on the stone wall. The scene then opens up as the camera turns away from the architecture, departing through tree-lined park paths while the cathedral recedes into the background.
